---
title: "Emmeline Mary Spratt"
---

## Emmeline Mary Spratt

**Dates:** (b. 1857)

### Description

infant school teacher

### Biography

Niece of CMY’s maid Harriet Spratt, she married (1883) William John Gibson (b.Peshawur 1853), clerk.  She was living at Elderfield during the 1871 census.  She was daughter of William Spratt (1819-1872) and Ann Bond (1820-1863). [marriage certificate and tree from Barrie Spratt]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 22d 1878[[footnote:1]]
- Letter from [1878?]
- Letter from June 5th 1877 
- Letter from May 9th 1873
- Letter from Decr 31st [1872]
- Letter from Decr 18th 1872
- Letter from March 23d 1872

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
